note: Discovery watchlists for the Pillar-C lit-KB (N-C §4.1/§4.2). Edited via `kb watch`. Each watchlist maps to one live architecture thread; from_year bounds the sweep; queries run against OpenAlex search (+ optional arXiv query). Grey-lit URLs are page-snapshot sources (WebFetch/RSS side; not fetched by the API pipeline).

watchlists.name: verifier-prm
watchlists.thread: verifier / process-reward-model loop (F2 seam, arch-survey F2-verifier)
watchlists.openalex_search: process reward model OR step-level verifier OR self-verification large language model reasoning
watchlists.arxiv_query: all:"process reward model" OR all:"verifier" AND cat:cs.CL

watchlists.name: structured-parsing-code
watchlists.thread: deterministic structure-parsing at the model boundary; code as intermediate representation (lit line 4)
watchlists.openalex_search: constrained decoding structured output large language model OR program-aided reasoning code intermediate representation
watchlists.arxiv_query: all:"constrained decoding" OR all:"program-aided" AND cat:cs.CL

watchlists.name: neurosymbolic-in-network
watchlists.thread: neurosymbolic computation inside the network: VSA/HRR/TPR hybrids, symbolic inference between layers (lit lines 1+4)
watchlists.openalex_search: vector symbolic architecture transformer OR tensor product representation neural network OR neurosymbolic reasoning inside language model
watchlists.arxiv_query: all:"vector symbolic" OR all:"tensor product representation" AND (cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.NE)

watchlists.name: lcm-latent-reasoning
watchlists.thread: large concept models / sentence-level latent reasoning / continuous chain-of-thought (LCM, CALM, Coconut class)
watchlists.openalex_search: large concept model sentence embedding reasoning OR continuous latent reasoning language model OR chain of continuous thought
watchlists.arxiv_query: all:"large concept model" OR all:"latent reasoning" AND cat:cs.CL

watchlists.name: sae-interp
watchlists.thread: sparse autoencoders / dictionary-feature interpretability and its 2025 corrections (A6 seam)
watchlists.openalex_search: sparse autoencoder interpretability language model features OR dictionary learning transformer residual stream

watchlists.name: kv-injection-bridges
watchlists.thread: trained-bridge injection: knowledge into KV cache / soft prompts / adapters over frozen LMs (L3 core cell)
watchlists.openalex_search: knowledge injection frozen language model adapter OR key value cache augmentation knowledge OR soft prompt knowledge encoding

grey_lit.name: transformer-circuits
grey_lit.why: Anthropic mech-interp threads; several load-bearing L3 sources were posts, not papers

grey_lit.name: gdm-mech-interp-medium
grey_lit.why: the GDM SAE deprioritisation lived here (L3 §5)
